TextView.android:text:
Your Weekly Goals

1. Plan Your Week
Spend Sunday night mapping out your top tasks.

2. Three Main Objectives
Pick three big wins to focus on this week.

3. Daily Activity
Aim for at least 30 minutes of movement every day.

4. Meal Prep
Prepare healthy snacks to avoid impulse eating.

5. Digital Detox
Reduce non-essential screen time by one hour.

6. Stay Hydrated
Hit your water intake goal five days in a row.

7. Learning Time
Read or listen to a book for 20 minutes daily.

8. Connect with Others
Reach out to a friend or family member.

9. Consistent Sleep
Go to bed at the same time every weeknight.

10. Sunday Review
Reflect on what went well and what to improve.
